tools.name: query.queryQueryPost
tools.description: Accepts search query objects array each with query and optional filter. Break down complex questions into sub-questions. Refine results by criteria, e.g. time / source, don't do this often. Split queries if ResponseTooLargeError occurs.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
